proof:
by
  exists (λ n => ⟨2 * fnz n, ⟨fnz n, rfl⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intro n1 n2 h
    have h1 : 2 * fnz n1 = 2 * fnz n2 := congr_arg Subtype.val h
    have h2 : fnz n1 = fnz n2 := by
      have h3 : 2 * (fnz n1 - fnz n2) = 0 := by rw [Int.mul_sub, h1, Int.sub_self]
      have h4 := Int.mul_eq_zero.mp h3
      cases h4 with
      | inl h5 => contradiction
      | inr h5 => exact Int.eq_of_sub_eq_zero h5
    have h3 : fzn (fnz n1) = fzn (fnz n2) := congr_arg fzn h2
    exact (congr_fun fzn_fnz n1).symm.trans (h3.trans (congr_fun fzn_fnz n2))
  · intro ⟨n, hn⟩
    rcases hn with ⟨k, rfl⟩
    exists fzn k
    apply Subtype.ext
    dsimp
    exact congr_arg (λ x => 2 * x) (congr_fun fnz_fzn k)
successful_attempts:
by
  exists (λ n => ⟨2 * fnz n, ⟨fnz n, rfl⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intro n1 n2 h
    have h1 : 2 * fnz n1 = 2 * fnz n2 := congr_arg Subtype.val h
    have h2 : fnz n1 = fnz n2 := by
      have h3 : 2 * (fnz n1 - fnz n2) = 0 := by rw [Int.mul_sub, h1, Int.sub_self]
      have h4 := Int.mul_eq_zero.mp h3
      cases h4 with
      | inl h5 => contradiction
      | inr h5 => exact Int.eq_of_sub_eq_zero h5
    have h3 : fzn (fnz n1) = fzn (fnz n2) := congr_arg fzn h2
    exact (congr_fun fzn_fnz n1).symm.trans (h3.trans (congr_fun fzn_fnz n2))
  · intro ⟨n, hn⟩
    rcases hn with ⟨k, rfl⟩
    exists fzn k
    apply Subtype.ext
    dsimp
    exact congr_arg (λ x => 2 * x) (congr_fun fnz_fzn k)
